thesis_hint: Recent quality is improving on the strongest active branch (VVV funding snapback QScore 0.3182 -> 0.5323 -> 0.5323), so exploration is allowed. Target BABY 1h because funding is still extremely negative (-0.00776) with very high open interest and rising volume; build a post-capitulation long setup that requires a reclaim of intraday trend structure after a washout, with a hard veto against continuation downtrends. Avoid passive mean-reversion and avoid ultra-strict filters that collapse trade count.
stop_condition: Stop when any variant reaches QScore >= 1.0 with >= 20 trades and max_drawdown_pct <= 8.0; abort any variant with total_trades < 15, profit_factor < 1.08, or trending regime profit_factor < 0.95.
